scripts.test: node -e "const {decodeCfEmail,extractEmails,extractPhones,extractLinks}=require('./server.js');let p=0,f=0;function t(n,fn){try{fn();p++;console.log('PASS:',n)}catch(e){f++;console.log('FAIL:',n,'-',e.message)}}function a(c,m){if(!c)throw new Error(m)};const k=0x27,em='test@example.com',enc=em.split('').map(c=>(c.charCodeAt(0)^k).toString(16).padStart(2,'0')).join(''),fe=k.toString(16).padStart(2,'0')+enc;t('decodeCfEmail',()=>a(decodeCfEmail(fe)==='test@example.com'));t('decodeCfEmail rejects bad hex',()=>a(decodeCfEmail('xyz')===null));t('decodeCfEmail rejects non-email',()=>a(decodeCfEmail('271234')===null));t('extractEmails CF',()=>{const r=extractEmails('x');a(r.includes('test@example.com'))});t('extractEmails mailto',()=>{const r=extractEmails('x');a(r.includes('u@t.co'))});t('extractEmails plain',()=>{const r=extractEmails('hi@there.com');a(r.includes('hi@there.com'))});t('extractEmails filters image-like',()=>{const r=extractEmails('a@b.png c@d.com');a(!r.includes('a@b.png')&&r.includes('c@d.com'))});t('extractEmails HTML entities',()=>{const r=extractEmails('test@test.com');a(r.includes('test@test.com'))});t('extractPhones finds',()=>a(extractPhones('Call +1 (555) 123-4567').length>0));t('extractPhones filters short',()=>a(extractPhones('v2.0 call 123').length===0));t('extractLinks relative',()=>{const r=extractLinks('x','https://ex.com');a(r.includes('https://ex.com/page'))});t('extractLinks stop domains',()=>{const r=extractLinks('x','https://ex.com');a(!r.some(l=>l.includes('facebook.com')))});t('extractLinks filters javascript:',()=>{const r=extractLinks('x','https://ex.com');a(!r.includes('javascript:void(0)'))});t('extractLinks filters .css',()=>{const r=extractLinks('x','https://ex.com');a(!r.some(l=>l.includes('.css')))});console.log('\n'+p+' passed, '+f+' failed');process.exit(f>0?1:0)"
